postings.title: Staff Hardware Engineer: Connectivity Modules
top_requirements: Hands-on experience designing and validating connectivity modules for automotive applications
Proficiency in hardware design and development for wireless communications systems
Experience with system-level testing and validation of connectivity modules
postings.summary: This role involves designing and developing connectivity modules for automotive applications, which aligns with the candidate's experience in communications systems design and test. The candidate's background in RF systems and signal processing would be valuable in this position.

postings.title: Wireless RF Compliance Validation Engineer (RSE)
top_requirements: Hands-on experience with RF regulatory compliance testing and validation
Proficiency in RF systems analysis and design
Experience with wireless communications protocols and standards
postings.summary: This role involves performing RF regulatory compliance testing and validation, which aligns with the candidate's experience in RF systems and signal processing. The candidate's background in communications systems design and test would be valuable in this position.

postings.title: RF / Wireless Systems Engineer
top_requirements: Hands-on experience designing and developing RF and wireless systems
Proficiency in RF systems analysis and design
Experience with signal processing and algorithm development for wireless systems
postings.summary: This role involves designing and developing RF and wireless systems, which aligns with the candidate's experience in communications systems design and test. The candidate's background in RF systems and signal processing would be valuable in this position.

postings.title: Senior Embedded Software Engineer - IoT Wireless Applications
top_requirements: Hands-on experience designing and developing embedded software for IoT and wireless applications
Proficiency in programming languages such as C and C++
Experience with system-level testing and validation of embedded software
postings.summary: This role involves designing and developing embedded software for IoT and wireless applications, which aligns with the candidate's experience in communications systems design and test. The candidate's background in RF systems and signal processing would be valuable in this position.
